name: Creamy Buttermilk Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, heavy cream, apple juice concentrate, egg beaters, honey, salt, gluten flour, and baking soda until well combined.
2. Gradually add in the whole-wheat flour and yeast, stirring with a fork until just incorporated.
3. Cover the dough and let it rest for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat your oven to the desired temperature.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and crusty, about 40-45 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
